endpoints.name: GET /delegatedProviders/{delegatedProviderId}/offers
endpoints.description: Get the list of offers for the specified delegated provider.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DELEGATEDPROVIDERID}} with a real delegatedproviderid.

endpoints.name: GET /delegatedProviders/{delegatedProviderId}/offers/{offerName}
endpoints.description: Get the specified offer for the delegated provider.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN. Replace {{DELEGATEDPROVIDERID}} with a real delegatedproviderid. Replace {{OFFERNAME}} with a real offername.

endpoints.name: GET /offers
endpoints.description: Get the list of public offers for the root provider.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{AZURE_ACCESS_TOKEN}} with your AZURE ACCESS TOKEN.
